title: The Waning Sex
writer: Joseph Farnham, Fanny Hatton, Frederic Hatton
actors: Norma Shearer, Conrad Nagel, George K. Arthur
plot: Nina Duane (Norma Shearer) is a criminal lawyer whose gender is professionally resented by Philip Barry (Conrad Nagel), the District Attorney. She wins acquittal for man-chasing widow Mary Booth (Mary McAllister), then defeats her...
